title: Alphabetize connected boards column selections
excerpt: Would like the ability to view the boards in a connected boards column alphabetically.  Currently, I believe they are ordered in the way we add the boards to the column, but we are constantly connecting multiple boards, …

posts.author: dara_t (Dara Thomason)
posts.cookedHtml: Would like the ability to view the boards in a connected boards column alphabetically. Currently, I believe they are ordered in the way we add the boards to the column, but we are constantly connecting multiple boards, so would love for Monday to auto- alphabetize these.
